response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in open-source and cross-functional projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and deep cloud-native AI deployment history—key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and mentoring workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI production systems in 8+ years of experience
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
Experience with DLang and embedded systems dominates resume but is less relevant to cloud-based GenAI
